## Phase Goal (from 51-SPEC.md)
Replace the runtime-injection path through `fork-bridge.ts` with 3 concrete in-tree classes (`TmuxMultiplexer`, `SessionManager`, `PaneGridPlanner`) directly composed in `src/features/tmux/integration.ts`, with ≥ 10 ORIGIN annotations + 6 BATS + 15+ vitest + verbatim L1 verification.

## 7 EARS Gates

| ID | Requirement | Plan tasks | Plan acceptance |
|----|------------|-----------|-----------------|
| REQ-51-01 | 3 in-tree classes (~770 LOC) with ≥ 10 ORIGIN annotations | T2, T3, T4 | `wc -l` per file in range; `grep -c "ORIGIN: opencode-tmux/src"` ≥ 10 total |
| REQ-51-02 | Rewrite `integration.ts` as factory-of-real-classes (~200 LOC), no fork-bridge import, no D-04 check | T5 | `grep -n "fork-bridge" src/features/tmux/integration.ts` returns 0; `wc -l` 180-220 |
| REQ-51-03 | Remove `fork-bridge.ts` + `fork-bridge.test.ts`; global grep returns 0 | T6 | ls returns "No such file"; global grep returns 0 |
| REQ-51-04 | 6 BATS scenarios (2/cluster), PID-based socket, sequential | T7 | `bats tests/scripts/tmux/` reports 6/0 |
| REQ-51-05 | 15+ new vitest cases in 3 new test files (5+/file) | T7 | `npx vitest run tests/lib/tmux/` shows ≥ 15 new tests passing |
| REQ-51-06 | D-04 graceful-fallback invariant preserved | T5, T6 | main body of `tests/lib/tmux/integration.test.ts` + `tmux-copilot.test.ts` (12 tests) pass without modification |
| REQ-51-07 | 1 atomic git commit; `51-VERIFICATION.md` with verbatim tsc + vitest + BATS output | T8 | `git log --oneline -1` shows single new commit; `51-VERIFICATION.md` exists with verbatim outputs |

## Plan Structure
- Wave 1: T1 (types.ts, D-51-01)
- Wave 2: T2, T3, T4 (3 classes, parallel)
- Wave 3: T5 (integration.ts rewrite, REQ-51-02)
- Wave 4: T6 (fork-bridge removal, REQ-51-03)
- Wave 5: T7 (3 new vitest + 3 BATS = 6 scenarios, REQ-51-04+05)
- Wave 6: T8 (atomic commit + VERIFICATION.md, REQ-51-07)

   - `grep -c "^\s*it(" tests/lib/tmux/tmux-copilot.test.ts` — expect 12
   - `grep -n "fork-bridge" src/features/tmux/integration.ts` — expect L12, L13 (T5 will remove)
   - `grep -n "existsSync.*opencode-tmux" src/features/tmux/integration.ts` — expect L197-202 (D-04, T5 will remove)
   - `ls tests/scripts/tmux/ 2>&1` — expect "No such file"
   - `grep -n "EnrichedSessionEvent" src/features/tmux/observers.ts | head -5` — expect ≥ 1 match
